description.zh: 嘿哟，兄弟。我有件事要请你帮忙。所以是这样，我找到机会开了一条全新的生产线，但总有些疯狗在不该把狗鼻子伸进去的地方疯狂狗叫，结果就是我本来要拿去卖的商品全被这些刺头抢走了，现在已经散遍整个塔科夫根本没法追回来了。大兄弟，帮我这一把好吗？
description.en: Heyo, brother. Got a new job for you. So, I've got an opportunity to open a new production line, but the problem is that some hustlers are hustling where they shouldn't hustle, and all the supplies I wanted to put into circulation have been scattered all over the city because of those pricks. Help me out, big guy?
